blockers: GKG CLI is missing from PATH and the GKG server is not reachable/indexed; GitNexus CLI and direct source inspection were used.

summary: Completed the post-report W-01 lab-result creation slice in the working tree. Staff can create lab results through /staff/lab-results/new against POST /api/v1/lab-results, RBAC now limits creation to Admin/Doctor, unit and Playwright coverage were added, backend lab integration tests passed, and readiness docs now mark W-01 closed. Final release decision remains Demo Ready Only until W-02/W-03 and final release verification are complete.
next_action: Implement and verify W-02 pharmacy dispensing and W-03 external notification delivery, then rerun the full release verification suite before any Production Ready claim.
